notes:
A big release that adds a new AI provider, hands-on file management, and a redesigned, more polished workspace.

### New

- **Mistral Vibe provider** ‚Äî choose Mistral's Vibe agent alongside your existing providers.
- **Files area actions** ‚Äî right-click to delete, rename, or create folders, drag files to move them, and drag in from Finder to copy files into your workspace.
- **Paste & drop images** ‚Äî paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into chat, or drag files onto a session to attach them.
- **Report a Bug** ‚Äî send bug reports and feedback directly from the app.
- **Tab shortcuts** ‚Äî jump to the next or previous tab with ‚åÉ‚á• and ‚åÉ‚áß‚á•.
- **What's New** ‚Äî see friendly, in-app release notes whenever the app updates.
- **Your Palette account** ‚Äî sign in to set up your account and organization, and see your profile right in the app.

### Improved

- **Chat transcript** ‚Äî a cleaner chronological view with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Workspace polish** ‚Äî native tinted glass on macOS, refined code blocks, tooltips, colors, and shimmering "working" labels.
- **Sidebar & explorer** ‚Äî a reworked explorer with Skills and History tabs, plus illustrated empty states for Files, Changes, Skills, and Sessions.
- **Skills panel** ‚Äî rebuilt with source and provider filters.
- **Quickstart** ‚Äî redesigned create-workspace, marketplace, and template screens.
- **Menu pages** ‚Äî open References, Marketplace, Help, and Organisational context as full pages, with the current page shown in the titlebar.
- **Tab indicators** ‚Äî clearer unread and attention markers across tabs and sessions.
- **Plan mode** ‚Äî "Keep chatting" lets you interrupt and redirect while a plan is in progress.
- **Message recovery** ‚Äî your message is restored to the input if you cancel before a response arrives.

### Fixed

- **Tab stability** ‚Äî fixed a crash when closing tabs and made the whole tab clickable, not just its label.
- **In-app links** ‚Äî clicking a link no longer navigates the entire app window.
- **Mentions & queued messages** ‚Äî the mention popover and queued-message tray now stay tied to the active session.
- **Empty states** ‚Äî repaired blank history and Skills views, and replaced a raw What's New heading with a friendly summary.

A big release that adds a new AI provider, richer file management, and a more polished chat and workspace experience throughout.

### New

- **Mistral Vibe provider** ‚Äî pick Mistral's Vibe agent alongside Claude when starting a session.
- **File management in the Files area** ‚Äî right-click to delete, rename, or create folders, drag files to move them, and drag in from Finder to copy.
- **Paste images into chat** ‚Äî drop in screenshots and clipboard images as attachments without saving them first.
- **Report a Bug** ‚Äî send feedback and bug reports directly from the app.
- **What's New** ‚Äî see friendly, readable release notes inside the app after each update.
- **Native tab shortcuts** ‚Äî jump between tabs with ‚åÉ‚á• and ‚åÉ‚áß‚á•.
- **Your profile** ‚Äî your account details now load and display from your Palette profile.
- **Menu pages** ‚Äî open References, Marketplace, Help, and Org context as full pages in the main area.

### Improved

- **Chat transcript** ‚Äî messages and tool runs now read as a single chronological timeline with related steps grouped together.
- **Drag-to-attach** ‚Äî a drop overlay appears when you drag files over a session.
- **Skills panel** ‚Äî rebuilt with source and provider filters, and the explorer now has dedicated Skills and History tabs per session.
- **Keep chatting** ‚Äî interrupt a plan and continue the conversation without losing your place.
- **Cancel safety** ‚Äî a message you send is restored to the input if you cancel before a response arrives.
- **Tab indicators** ‚Äî clearer unread and attention markers on tabs and sessions, plus a titlebar breadcrumb showing the open page.
- **Quickstart redesign** ‚Äî refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Visual polish** ‚Äî native tinted glass on macOS, nicer code blocks, tooltips, shimmering working labels, and illustrated empty states across the sidebar.

### Fixed

- **Tab stability** ‚Äî closing a tab no longer crashes, and the whole tab is now clickable rather than just its label.
- **In-app links** ‚Äî clicking a link no longer navigates away from the app.
- **Mentions and queued messages** ‚Äî the mention popover and queued-message tray now stay scoped to the active session.
- **Empty states** ‚Äî history and Skills views no longer show up blank when they shouldn't.

### New

- **Report a Bug** ‚Äî send feedback and bug reports straight from the app.
- **What's New** ‚Äî see friendly, AI-generated release notes in-app after each update.
- **Paste & drop images** ‚Äî paste screenshots or clipboard images as attachments, with a drop-to-attach overlay when you drag files over a session.
- **Drag files in and around** ‚Äî drag files in the Files area to move them, and drag straight from Finder to copy them in.
- **Tab shortcuts** ‚Äî jump between tabs with native ‚åÉ‚á• and ‚åÉ‚áß‚á• shortcuts.
- **Skills & History explorer** ‚Äî a rebuilt Skills panel with source and provider filters, plus a reworked sidebar with Skills and History tabs that remember each session.
- **Context pages** ‚Äî open References, Marketplace, Help, and your org's context as full main-area pages, with a redesigned Palette surface.
- **Keep chatting** ‚Äî interrupt a running plan to keep the conversation going.

### Improved

- **Chronological transcript** ‚Äî sessions now read top to bottom with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Tab & session indicators** ‚Äî clearer unread and attention markers across tabs and sessions.
- **Titlebar breadcrumb** ‚Äî the currently open menu page now shows in the titlebar.
- **Cancel keeps your message** ‚Äî cancelling before a response restores your text to the input so nothing is lost.
- **Redesigned flows** ‚Äî refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Empty states** ‚Äî friendly illustrated placeholders for sessions, Files, Changes, and Skills.
- **Visual polish** ‚Äî native tinted glass, cleaner chat code blocks, smoother tab hover and shimmer animations, and tighter alignment across rows, popovers, and icons.

### Fixed

- **Tab clicks** ‚Äî closing a tab no longer crashes, and the whole tab is clickable, not just its label.
- **In-app links** ‚Äî clicking a link no longer navigates away from the app.
- **Session states** ‚Äî fixed cases where history and Skills could silently show up empty.

### New

- **Report a Bug** ‚Äî send feedback straight from the app when something goes wrong.
- **What's New** ‚Äî see friendly release notes right inside the app after each update.
- **Image attachments** ‚Äî paste screenshots and clipboard images, or drag files over a session to attach them.
- **Tab shortcuts** ‚Äî jump to the next or previous tab with ‚åÉ‚á• and ‚åÉ‚áß‚á•.
- **Menu pages** ‚Äî open References, Marketplace, Help, and your org context as full pages in the main area.
- **Keep your message on cancel** ‚Äî text you sent is restored to the input if you cancel before a response arrives.

### Improved

- **Reworked sidebar** ‚Äî the explorer now has Skills and History tabs that remember their state per session.
- **Skills panel** ‚Äî rebuilt with source and provider filters so you can find the right skill faster.
- **Chronological transcript** ‚Äî messages and tool runs are grouped in order for an easier-to-follow conversation.
- **Keep chatting while planning** ‚Äî interrupt a plan to chat without losing your place.
- **Tab indicators** ‚Äî clearer unread and attention markers across tabs and sessions, plus the current page shown in the titlebar breadcrumb.
- **Illustrated empty states** ‚Äî friendlier placeholders for Sessions, Files, Changes, and Skills.
- **Redesigned quickstart** ‚Äî refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Visual polish** ‚Äî native tinted glass on macOS, smoother tab hover, refined session rows and icons, and shimmering "working" labels.

### Fixed

- **Tab clicks** ‚Äî the whole tab is clickable now, and closing a tab no longer crashes.
- **In-app links** ‚Äî clicking a link no longer navigates away from the app.
- **Session history** ‚Äî empty history and Skills views no longer fail silently.

### New
- **In-app What's New** ‚Äî see friendly, AI-generated release notes right inside the app after each update.
- **Skills & History explorer** ‚Äî browse Skills and session History in the sidebar, with state kept per session.
- **Paste images into chat** ‚Äî paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into a session as attachments.
- **Drag-and-drop attachments** ‚Äî a drop overlay appears while you drag files over a session so you can attach them in place.
- **Menu pages in the main area** ‚Äî open References, Marketplace, Help, and your Org context as full pages.

### Improved
- **Tab indicators** ‚Äî clearer unread and attention markers on tabs and sessions so you can tell what needs you.
- **Chronological transcript** ‚Äî chat now reads top-to-bottom with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Skills panel** ‚Äî rebuilt with source and provider filters to find the right skill faster.
- **Quickstart redesign** ‚Äî refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Plan mode** ‚Äî a "Keep chatting" interrupt, tab-scoped controls, and cleaner status chips.
- **Titlebar breadcrumb** ‚Äî the titlebar now shows which menu page you have open.
- **Empty states** ‚Äî illustrated placeholders for Files, Changes, and Skills when there's nothing to show.
- **Native macOS look** ‚Äî tinted glass styling and tab hover animations aligned with sessions.
- **Polished "working" labels** ‚Äî animated shimmer on working indicators, plus refreshed session rows, popovers, and icons.

Palette Desktop v0.16.0 brings a refreshed workspace experience with a new What's New panel, smarter file attachments, and a redesigned sidebar and quickstart flow.

### New

- **In-app What's New** ‚Äî see friendly, automatically generated release notes right inside the app whenever you update.
- **Paste images directly** ‚Äî paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into chat as attachments.
- **Drag-and-drop attachments** ‚Äî drop files anywhere over a session and a clear overlay shows you exactly where they'll attach.
- **Skills + History tabs** ‚Äî the sidebar explorer now includes dedicated Skills and History tabs that remember their state per session.

### Improved

- **Keep chatting while planning** ‚Äî interrupt a plan to keep the conversation going, with tab-scoped controls and cleaner status chips.
- **Cleaner transcript** ‚Äî chat now reads in a single chronological flow with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Skills panel** ‚Äî rebuilt with source and provider filters so you can find the right skill faster.
- **References, Marketplace, Help & Org context** ‚Äî these now open as full main-area pages instead of cramped popups.
- **Redesigned quickstart** ‚Äî refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Illustrated empty states** ‚Äî Files, Changes, and Skills now show helpful illustrations when there's nothing to display yet.
- **Native macOS polish** ‚Äî tinted glass effects and smoother, more consistent tab and session hover animations.
- **Visual refinements** ‚Äî session rows, popovers, and icons tightened up across the app.
- **Animated status labels** ‚Äî "working" labels now shimmer with a subtle shine while tasks run.
